hero.badge: Launching Soon on iOS · Be the First to Know
hero.sub: Turn the books you want to read into achievable goals. Track your daily reading and build a habit that lasts — with Bookgolas.

features.label: Features
features.title: Reading made this rewarding
features.sub: Set goals, track progress, achieve more. Bookgolas is your trusted companion on every reading journey.
features.f1Desc: Add books you want to read and set target finish dates. Build a personal reading plan that works for you.
features.f2Desc: Log today's pages and watch your progress bar grow. Small records, big achievements.
features.f3Desc: Get reading reminders at the time you choose. Stay consistent even on your busiest days.
features.f4Desc: All your finished books in one place. Look back on your reading journey and celebrate every win.

appDetail.label: App Details
appDetail.title: Here's how Bookgolas works
appDetail.sub: Record every reading moment and move toward your goals. Simple, but everything you need.
appDetail.d1Desc: Set a target finish date for each book and manage your daily page goals. Progress updates in real time, and your estimated finish date is calculated automatically.
appDetail.d2Desc: Search books via the Aladin API and get the cover, author, and page count filled in automatically. Start a goal in seconds — no manual entry needed.
appDetail.d3Desc: Daily reading entries stack up on your calendar. Maintain your reading streak and build a lasting habit. Missed days are easy to spot at a glance.
appDetail.d4Desc: See how many books you've read this month and how many pages you've logged. Understand your reading patterns and set smarter goals.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: 3 steps to get started
howItWorks.sub: No complicated setup. From install to your first reading log in under 2 minutes.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Sign up in 10 seconds with email or Apple account
howItWorks.s2Desc: Search for books and set your target finish date
howItWorks.s3Desc: Record today's pages and watch your progress update automatically

cta.title: Be the First to Know
cta.sub: We'll email you the moment Bookgolas hits the App Store. Sign up once and you're set for launch day ✨

waitlist.title: Get Launch Notification
waitlist.description: Bookgolas is launching on iOS soon. Be the first to hear when it's live.
waitlist.successDesc: We'll email you the moment Bookgolas launches.
waitlist.duplicate: You're already on the list — see you at launch!
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
waitlist.privacy: We'll only email you about the launch — nothing else.

screenshots.title: See it in action
screenshots.sub: Take a peek at the key screens. Clean and intuitive — reading made enjoyable.
